title: cassinia tenuis
intro: Cassinia tenuis, also known as the coastal cassinia or slender cassinia, is a shrub-like plant native to Australia. It is traditionally used by indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cassinia tenuis include relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic and wound healer. Cassinia tenuis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and topical creams, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
